scripts.prepare:web: mkdir -p www www/gamesfx www/astgfx www/powerups www/newsfx www/newsfxdesigned www/assets/music www/assets/newsfx www/assets/vo3 www/assets/video www/combo_fx && cp -f index.html style.css script.js pixiRenderer.js galaxyBackground.js ufo-death-effect.js favicon.png favicon.ico favicon-16x16.png favicon-32x32.png apple-touch-icon.png android-chrome-192.png android-chrome-512.png site.webmanifest Kaleidoscope_Magic.mp3 reveal1.mp3 reveal2.mp3 reveal3.mp3 reveal4.mp3 taporb.mp3 crystalballfx.mp4 www/ && cp -f assets/video/*.mp4 www/assets/video/ && (cp -f assets/video/*.mov www/assets/video/ 2>/dev/null || true) && cp -f assets/stroids_menu_logo.png www/assets/ && if [ -f firebase-config.js ]; then cp -f firebase-config.js www/; fi && cp -f gamesfx/*.mp3 www/gamesfx/ && (cp -f gamesfx/*.wav www/gamesfx/ 2>/dev/null || true) && cp -f newsfx/*.mp3 www/newsfx/ && cp -f newsfxdesigned/*.mp3 www/newsfxdesigned/ && cp -f assets/music/*.mp3 www/assets/music/ && cp -f assets/newsfx/*.mp3 www/assets/newsfx/ && cp -f assets/vo3/*.mp3 www/assets/vo3/ && cp -f astgfx/*.png www/astgfx/ && cp -f powerups/powerup_*.png www/powerups/ && cp -f combo_fx/*.png combo_fx/*.json combo_fx/*.mp3 www/combo_fx/ && mkdir -p www/slotart && cp -f slotart/*.png www/slotart/ && mkdir -p www/vendor && cp -f node_modules/pixi.js/dist/pixi.min.mjs www/vendor/pixi.min.js && cp -f node_modules/pixi.js/dist/pixi.min.mjs www/vendor/pixi.min.mjs && mkdir -p www/vo && (cp -f vo/*.mp3 www/vo/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp -f vo/*.png www/vo/ 2>/dev/null || true) && cp -rf commander www/ && mkdir -p www/commander && cp -f "local/commander design"/*.jpg www/commander/ && node resizeCommander.js
scripts.cap:init: npx cap init "Poly Oracle" com.polyoracle.app --web-dir www
scripts.cap:sync: npm run prepare:web && npx cap sync ios
scripts.cap:sync:all: npm run prepare:web && npx cap sync
scripts.bootstrap:ios: npm run install:cap && npm run cap:add:ios && npm run cap:sync
